header.title: List
header.subtitle: Utility CSS classes for bulleted, ordered, and description lists. Applied directly to semantic ul, ol, and dl elements — no React component required.

bulleted.title: Bulleted
bulleted.description: Unordered list with disc bullets. Apply nx-list to a ul element.

ordered.title: Ordered
ordered.description: Numbered list. Apply nx-list and nx-list--ordered to an ol element.

description.title: Description list
description.description: Term and definition pairs. Apply nx-list and nx-list--description to a dl element.

customIcon.title: With custom icon
customIcon.description: Replace the default bullet with a Lucide icon by omitting the list-style and adding an icon inside each li.

nested.title: Nested list
nested.description: A list inside a list. Child lists inherit the same nx-list styles and add a top margin for visual separation.

bulleted.item1: Accessible by default — uses semantic HTML elements
bulleted.item2: Styled via CSS custom properties for automatic theme support
bulleted.item3: No JavaScript or React components needed

ordered.item1: Install the package with your preferred package manager
ordered.item2: Import the CSS file in your layout
ordered.item3: Apply the class to your list element
ordered.item4: Customize with CSS custom properties as needed

description.def1: Base class for all list variants. Adds consistent spacing and font styling.
description.def2: Applies decimal numbering to the list.
description.def3: Styles dt and dd elements for term/definition pairs.

customIcon.item2: Styled with Tailwind v4 and CSS custom properties
customIcon.item3: Icons from the Lucide icon library

list.description: Base bulleted list. Adds disc bullets, spacing, and muted bullet color.

ordered.description: Enables decimal numbering. Use with nx-list.

description.description: Removes bullets and styles dt (semibold) and dd (muted, indented) pairs.

compact.description: Reduces vertical gap between items for dense layouts.
